page_metadata.biotools__summary: CLPred is a tool for sequence-based protein crystallization predictor using bidirectional recurrent neural network with long short-term memory (BLSTM). BLSTM to capture the long-range interaction patterns between k-mers amino acids.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CLPred is a tool for sequence-based protein crystallization predictor using bidirectional recurrent neural network with long short-term memory (BLSTM). BLSTM to capture the long-range interaction patterns between k-mers amino acids.
